prompt: Order these physics milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Newton's laws of motion
events.fact: 1687 — Principia Mathematica details gravity and mechanics

events.title: Double-slit experiment
events.fact: 1801 — Thomas Young demonstrates wave nature of light

events.title: Heisenberg uncertainty
events.fact: 1927 — details limit of precision in quantum measurements

events.title: Gravitational waves detected
events.fact: 2015 — LIGO detects ripple from merging black holes
